pattern: Map the rule key to a fixed column index, then tally how many rows carry the requested value in that column.
hints: Each item is a fixed triple; the rule key only ever points at one of three positions.
Translate the textual key into a column index of 0, 1, or 2 before scanning.
Iterate the items once and count those whose chosen column equals the rule value.

edge_inputs.description: value appears in name column but rule asks for type

stress.description: many random triples with one of three rule keys
